definition: QE/QT operates as an independent correlation channel distinct from the policy rate. QE removes duration from the private sector (correlation-suppressive); QT restores it (correlation-promoting). QT cessation (late 2026-2027) is a time-bound catalyst for correlation stabilization.
evidence: ~$1.8-2.0T shed from peak Fed balance sheet
Fed cannot simultaneously tighten via QT and ease via rate cuts without contradictory signals
BOJ YCC case as extreme supporting evidence
Quantification of QT's specific contribution is model-dependent
open_questions: How much QT specifically contributes to positive correlation vs fiscal supply and inflation uncertainty
Whether QT cessation alone is sufficient or merely necessary for stabilization
